error_signature: 404 error when testing form trigger URL
title: Form trigger node opens incorrect URL
symptom: When testing the form trigger node, it opens a 404 error page instead of the intended test URL. The popup shows 'n8n.io - Workflow Automation' instead of the actual testing URL.
applies_when: Testing workflows with a specific URL
not_this_if: The workflow is executed in a production environment
The correct URL is opened without errors
root_cause: The issue arises from incorrect environment variable settings, specifically the `WEBHOOK_URL`. If this variable does not point to the correct service URL, n8n will generate an incorrect URL for the form trigger, leading to a 404 error.
fix_steps: Restart the n8n service to apply changes
agent_instruction: Update the `WEBHOOK_URL` in your compose file to point to the correct service URL and restart n8n.
